title: Deeplus project source-role carrier
x-deeplus-identity: path is unique after project-root-relative lexical normalization; symlink resolution is a host policy and must occur before lookup

x-deeplus-normalized-path-uniqueness.algorithm: normalize each path to a project-root-relative lexical path, then insert into a map before parsing; a second row with the same normalized key is rejected even when its source_role differs
x-deeplus-normalized-path-uniqueness.comparison: Unicode scalar exact after slash normalization and removal of dot segments; case folding is a host policy performed before this contract

x-deeplus-precedence: the project manifest is authoritative for project builds; --source-role is permitted only for a single file absent from a manifest; IDEs expose the manifest value and may not silently override it
